title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: OAKRIDGE WARMING CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below. Dinner and breakfast will be provided. 48362 Highway 58 Oakridge, OR 97463 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Well behaved pets allowed. Hours: Open 6:30pm-7am when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below (541) 782-2258 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 782-2258 Greenwaters Park Community Center INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. There is a sign on Highway 58 when the shelter is open. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Oakridge and Westfir Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OAKRIDGE WARMING CENTER
